title: 5C Effecting Change — Социальные и экологические проблемы

items.example: Climate change is one of the biggest challenges facing humanity.
Deforestation in the Amazon rainforest has reached alarming levels.
Burning fossil fuels like coal and gas contributes to global warming.
Solar and wind power are the most common forms of renewable energy.
Recyclable material should not end up in landfill sites.
Workplaces should aim for diversity within every department.
A new charity was set up to look after the welfare of homeless people.
Many families are suffering financial hardship due to the rising cost of living.
Local charities fund shelters for people who have no home.
The number of people sleeping rough on the streets has increased.
Minority groups should not be neglected in government policies.
The company ensures equal opportunities for everyone who applies.
